original: This leash leads back to the fearsome kor’diiak bear you rented from Maja in Korg’ii Hold. So long as you equip it in your accessory slot, you will ride it, reducing travel time and the chance of encountering hostile creatures in Uveto’s wilds. It may also assist you in combat... from time to time.
